title: zanthoxylum friesii
intro: Zanthoxylum friesii, also known as the Fries' prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Zanthoxylum. This plant is a member of the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family, and is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The medicinal properties of Zanthoxylum friesii include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and support immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream through various herbal preparations.
